{{Fig|'''First post-lapse interval''' in Algorithm SM-15. The graph includes data from some 150,000 [[Glossary:repetition|repetition]]s, newly memorized [[Glossary:item|item]]s are optimally repeated after 14 days. However, the items that have been forgotten 10 times (which is rare in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]]) will require an interval of two days. Due to logarithmic scaling, the size of the circles is not proportional to the data sample. The number of repetition cases for Lapses{{=}}0 is by far larger than that for Lapses{{=}}10. as can be seen in '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Toolkit menu#Statistics|Statistics]] : [[Analysis]] : [[Analysis#Distributions|Distributions]] : [[Analysis#Lapses|Lapses]]'''}}
